changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO case_zaken_api_sync ( id, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, sync_assignee_as_behandelaar, note_sync_enabled, note_subject ) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), ztl.case_definition_key, ztl.case_definition_version_tag, false, true, COALESCE(NULLIF(pc.properties->>'noteSubject', ''), 'Note created by Valtimo GZAC') FROM plugin_configuration pc JOIN zaak_type_link ztl ON ztl.zaken_api_plugin_configuration_id = pc.plugin_configuration_id WHERE pc.plugin_definition_key = 'zakenapi' AND (pc.properties->>'noteEventListenerEnabled')::boolean = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM case_zaken_api_sync existing WHERE existing.case_definition_key = ztl.case_definition_key AND existing.case_definition_version_tag = ztl.case_definition_version_tag ) GROUP BY ztl.case_definition_key, ztl.case_definition_version_tag, pc.properties->>'noteSubject';

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO case_zaken_api_sync ( id, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, sync_assignee_as_behandelaar, note_sync_enabled, note_subject ) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(UUID()), ztl.case_definition_key, ztl.case_definition_version_tag, false, true, COALESCE( NULLIF(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pc.properties, '$.noteSubject')), 'null'), 'Note created by Valtimo GZAC' ) FROM plugin_configuration pc JOIN zaak_type_link ztl ON ztl.zaken_api_plugin_configuration_id = pc.plugin_configuration_id WHERE pc.plugin_definition_key = 'zakenapi' AND JSON_EXTRACT(pc.properties, '$.noteEventListenerEnabled') = TRUE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM case_zaken_api_sync existing WHERE existing.case_definition_key = ztl.case_definition_key AND existing.case_definition_version_tag = ztl.case_definition_version_tag ) GROUP BY ztl.case_definition_key, ztl.case_definition_version_tag, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pc.properties, '$.noteSubject'));
